'''Rallo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the leader of a [[Rebel cell (Gus Talon)|Rebel cell]] on the [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Gus Talon/Legends|Gus Talon]].

==Biography==
Living incognito as a local [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] [[Rallo's workshop|workshop]] owner, Rallo and his daughter [[Mala Tinero|Mala]] were firm opponents of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and smuggled goods to the fledgling Rebellion. When the biased Imperial [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Turrant]] tried to arrest Rallo and his group without cause, a battle soon ensued. The young officer surviving Rallo's defense immediately called for reinforcements; unexpectedly, they arrived in the form of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] which totally [[Bombing of Gus Talon|annihilated]] the small [[Gus Talon settlement|settlement]] and its population.
